calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Asset Acceptance Llc'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP T. KILDUFF, TEL. NO. 939-5604, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
EMMALOU GONZALES, TEL. NO. (510) 432-7825, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. EMMALOU GONZALES' Hearing On Claim Of Exemption IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, To be heard at 9:30 on the Law and Motion calendar. Pro Tem Judge: James Watson, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT

Plaintiff Asset Acceptance Llc'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Continued To Aug-31-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Emmalou Gonzales, Tel. 510.432.7825, Defendant/Claimant appearing on her own behalf;
Phil Kilduff, Esq. of L/O of Phil Kilduff, Tel. 415.673.0368, appearing specially for the plaintiff.

The matter was discussed. After hearing, DEFENDANT EMMALOU GONZALES' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to August 31, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 for defendant to provide additional documentary evidence, such as bank statements, as proof of her monthly income and expenses. Although the defendant provided the court with copies of her paystubs, rental agreement & daycare agreement at the hearing, the Court, after examining the documents, determined that they were not sufficient to establish her financial situation and support her claim. (Order continuing the hearing signed.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC's Motion For Terminating Sanctions, And In The Alternative, To Further Compel Response To Discovery, And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions Against Emmalou Gonzales is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH. NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)

Ntc Of Mtn For Terminating Sanctions, And In The Alt, To Further Compel Response To Discovery, And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions Against Emmalou Gonzales
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Continued To Oct-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS, AND IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO FURTHER COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY AND IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST EMMALOU GONZALES is continued to October 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of moving papers to Dept. 301. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Not reported

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Continued To Nov-24-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery Order For Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted And Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.

PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE'S Motion to Compel Response to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production is GRANTED. Defendant shall serve responses to Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production within 20 days of the hearing date.
Request for an Order that the genuineness of any documents and the truth of any matters specified in the requests be deemed admitted is GRANTED.
Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $900 pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 2033.290(d). Prevailing party to submit a form of order. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. NOT REPORTED.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Denied
